package_title: I will make AI product.demo ad videos for ecommerce brands
description:
🔧 I will make AI product.demo ad videos for ecommerce brands

I deliver a batch of 5-20 product showcase/ad variations from your product URL or images using Remotion + CogVideoX + InfernoFX (ComfyUI) + n8n — all free/self-hosted.

✅ What you get:
• Done-for-you setup — no technical skills needed
• Free, open-source tools (you own it, no SaaS lock-in)
• Charge $250-$1,000/batch; 20 variations vs 1 film shoot
• 7-day support after delivery

📦 Packages:
• Basic ($125, 3 days, 1 rev): 1 video, 1 workflow, Email support
• Standard ($500, 5 days, 2 rev): Up to 5 videos, Setup + test, Loom walkthrough, 7-day support
• Premium ($1000, 7 days, 3 rev): Unlimited videos, Full system, Monthly retainer option, Priority support

🚀 How it works:
1. You send product URL / script / brand kit
2. I generate & test the video creatives
3. I hand over + a 5-min Loom walkthrough

⚡ Why me: I use the same tools that power a 100-skill autonomous company.
